subject: fix vcpeutils
commit_message:
fix vcpeutils

removed relative imports and using the preferred method of importing.
use the open instead of file method to get files
use the new pyaml method that specifies the loader
use builtins.basestring for unicode and nonunicode comparison
use the correct method to call the robot framework logger warn
adding in unit tests for things to make sure they work

Change-Id: I15da74ff66988ef2610ada3ae21a1c6104c26c35
Issue-ID: INT-1061
Signed-off-by: DR695H <dr695h@att.com>

Patch Set 1:

not sure if basestring is valid in future py3 world. 

The built-in basestring abstract type was removed. Use str instead. The str and bytes types don’t have functionality enough in common to warrant a shared base class. The 2to3 tool (see below) replaces every occurrence of basestring with str.

Patch Set 1:

I need to update demo-k8s.sh to put in this test case but here is an example runTags line
kubectl --namespace onap exec dev-robot-robot-7b46f9fd7c-ms9j8 -- /var/opt/ONAP/runTags.sh -V /share/config/vm_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_robot_properties.py -V /share/config/integration_preload_parameters.py -v CSAR_FILE:/tmp/csar/service-Vfw20190505123347-csar.csar -v GLOBAL_BUILD_NUMBER:29176 -d /share/logs/0018_demo_instantiateVFWdirectso -i instantiateVFWdirectso --display 108


/tmp/csar is where onboard stores the csars on success distribute

Patch Set 1:

not sure if basestring is valid in future py3 world. 

in py3 str is the same as unicode, but i used the future package to install a backwards and forwards compatible
